questions.question_text: Design a digital Chebyshev filter using bilinear transformation. The filter has the following specifications. Pass band Frequency 0.3π, Stop band Frequency 0.5π, Pass band Ripples 1 √2 and Stop band Ripple 0.1. Compare the order of filter with IIM method.

questions.question_text: Design an FIR filter with frequency response using windowing technique where the ideal frequency response is = 1 for the pass band 2 frequency from -π/2 to < π/2 and zero otherwise, for N=5 and N=7 using Hanning window. Compare the results.
